Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Akura Justice]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — Akura Justice is a representative of the Akura clan and possesses the Goldsign from the Path of the Chainkeeper.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Justice is the First Gatekeeper of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Justice is an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Justice uses a device to measure lifelines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — The color of the light from Justice's lifeline device indicates age.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Justice uses soulfire to manipulate aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Justice performs tests for madra density, recovery rate, and stability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Justice uses a thorn-covered cap to assess spiritual perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Justice is an Archlord and a distant cousin of Akura Charity.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Justice is currently at home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Justice was looking for the dream tablets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Akura Justice is an old man with a long beard who uses shadow madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Akura Justice defended the portal alone on the fortress.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Akura Justice used the Strings of Shadow technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Akura Justice is a Sage of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Akura Justice is a subordinate of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Justice is an Akura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Justice opened a hangar specifically for cloud fortresses.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Justice is an ancient figure who mentored Charity when she was a girl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Justice wears black gloves.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
